title: Dude, What's My GePeUWU?
description: prints your gpu to the log and displays it on the top left of the title screen.
body:
# Dude, What's My GePeUWU

A mod that tells what GPU you're using for Minecraft from the title screen and in your logs, thus letting you avoid the annoyance that is loading into a world and pressing f3 to find out what your GPU is.

Can be very useful if you have a dual GPU laptop or tower and trying to figure out what GPU is your Minecraft using!

## In Game
![intel](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devOS-Sanity-Edition/DudeWhatsMyGePeUwu/main/images/intel.png)
![nvidia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devOS-Sanity-Edition/DudeWhatsMyGePeUwu/main/images/nvidia.png)

## In Logs
![intellog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devOS-Sanity-Edition/DudeWhatsMyGePeUwu/main/images/intel_log.png)
![nvidialog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/devOS-Sanity-Edition/DudeWhatsMyGePeUwu/main/images/nvidia_log.png)
